subcodes.title: Words to various people, spoken on 1912-11-01
subcodes.first_line: My health was absolutely not up to traveling but the assistance of the Blessed Beauty helped me. All affairs advance with His aid. Without His aid, all would come to naught.... Baha'u'llah has delivered us from all prejudices... If the socialists succeed they would seize the world's wealth and then divide it... I have said in America and Europe that there is only the question of votes in which women have been held back
subcodes.first_line_orig: من ابداً بنیهٴ سفر نداشتم ولی تأیید جمال مبارک مدد نمود هر امری بتأیید از پیش میرود اگر تأیید نباشد هیچ نمیشود
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @equality of men and women, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
